name: io.github.vitaliiserbynassisterr/agenttrust
description: Challenge-response quality verification for AI agents and MCP servers. Evaluates competency across 6 dimensions (accuracy, safety, reliability, process quality, latency, schema quality), runs adversarial probes, and issues W3C Verifiable Credentials.
title: AgentTrust

environmentVariables.name: GROQ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Groq API key for LLM judge (free tier available at console.groq.com)

environmentVariables.name: CEREBRAS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Cerebras API key for LLM judge (free tier available at cloud.cerebras.ai)

environmentVariables.name: MONGODB_URL
environmentVariables.description: MongoDB connection URL for persistent storage
